title: Evangelion 30101
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion 3.0+1.01             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sun Jun 06, 2021 6:21 pm Starting June 12th a new version of the movie is going to start playing in Japanese theaters. It's NOT a new cut of the film but an updated version where some cuts of animation have been finessed or altered in some way. tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) Google Translation: #シンエヴァ Last run big service! 2 ⃣ New version "EVANGELION :3 From the version when ".0 + 1.01" was released, a new version with the cuts replaced will be screened from 6/12 (Sat.)! ※ There is no change in the story etc. 3 ⃣ Also from 6/12 (Sat), screenings at Dolby Cinema will be decided at 6 theaters nationwide! "Last run big service! " seems to indicate this is the final part of the film's theatrical run in Japan. There's also a new booklet- EVA EXTRA EXTA - & new artwork (likely Shinji & Misato) being given out to people if they go. Undeniably in part this is happening to help the film cross the 9 billion yen mark. It's currently at around 8.7 billion yen and this should help it do that. After that attention should turn to the international market..... hopefully. Evangelion website page with more information: https://www.evangelion.co.jp/news/210607-2/ From website: (2) The new version "EVANGELION: 3.0 + 1.01" will be screened! With gratitude to everyone who supported this work, we replaced the cuts because we would like you to see the work in which the main part of the movie has been further adjusted. From June 12th (Saturday), which is the final screening timing of this film, which you want to see at the theater, it will be screened as the "EVANGELION: 3.0 + 1.01" version at screening halls nationwide. * Replacement is only a minor correction for each cut, and there is no change in the story. * Dolby Cinema, IMAX, and 4DX / MX4D will be screened in the "EVANGELION: 3.0 + 1.0" version from the beginning.

[]: Re: Evangelion 3.0+1.01             Quote Post by hui43210 » Sun Jun 06, 2021 6:57 pm That was quick to start the remastered/adding an extra number to the title! I imagine we're closer to international news in this case, my July prediction remains possible. I wonder if this means if this is the only version that'll be released on Blu Ray? Actually, that's been the standard for the other films correct?

[]: Re: Evangelion 3.0+1.01             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sun Jun 06, 2021 7:06 pm The 36 page EVA EXTRA EX booklet that will be given out to audience members seems to be specifically be about events that occured BEFORE the start of You Can (Not) Redo. . There's something in it called EVANGELION: 3.0 (-120min.) . With my limited copy & paste into translator skills I can't tell if these are interviews with the crew OR if it's a new little manga covering some of the story before 3.0. Either way, seems like a nice little bonus that *may* answer a question or two people have had for years. From Website: Official humbly made 36P booklet "EVA-EXTRA-EXTRA" Overview Cover draw down: Atsushi Nishikiori cartoon "EVANGELION: 3.0 (-120min.) " From the past "Evangelion: Q" was not be be told the day before Tan planning, Original / Supervised Hideaki Anno Screenplay / Director Kazuya Tsurumaki Manga Hidenori Matsubara Masahiro Maeda tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) Translation: Last run big service! 1 ⃣ Super luxurious! Visitor present Wrapped present Officially made 36P booklet "EVA-EXTRA-EXTRA" (A4 size) The gorgeous creators who participated in this work are reunited! A super-luxury booklet full of new drawings, including the day before ": Q" that has not been talked about so far! 6/12 (Sat) -Distributed at screening halls nationwide hui43210 wrote: I wonder if this means if this is the only version that'll be released on Blu Ray? Actually, that's been the standard for the other films correct?

[]: Re: Evangelion 3.0+1.01             Quote Post by hui43210 » Sun Jun 06, 2021 7:11 pm Holy crap, they're going to provide details about the time skip? That's going to be interesting. Warning for those avoiding spoilers though, I imagine, whatever form it is, will work under the assumption you've seen 3.0+1.0. So make sure you avoid this too

[]: Re: Evangelion 3.0+1.01             Quote Post by JoelcrNeto » Sun Jun 06, 2021 7:35 pm That booklet ("EVA-EXTRA-EXTRA") does indeed has a manga by Hidenori Matsubara and Mahiro Maeda. From official EVANGELION website wrote: 漫画 “EVANGELION:3.0（-120min.)”収録 [...] 漫画 松原秀典 前田真宏

[]: Re: Evangelion 3.0+1.01             Quote Post by hui43210 » Sun Jun 06, 2021 7:44 pm JoelcrNeto wrote: That booklet ("EVA-EXTRA-EXTRA") does indeed has a manga by Hidenori Matsubara and Mahiro Maeda. From official EVANGELION website wrote: 漫画 “EVANGELION:3.0（-120min.)”収録 [...] 漫画 松原秀典 前田真宏

[]: Re: Evangelion 3.0+1.01             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sun Jun 06, 2021 7:49 pm They REALLY wanna get the film to 10 billion yen don't they? I wonder if this might just be the trick to get them there.

[]: Re: Evangelion 3.0+1.01             Quote Post by Konja7 » Sun Jun 06, 2021 7:54 pm hui43210 wrote: That's so cool! I've been hoping for a manga about the timpskip since 3.0 came out!

[]: Re: Evangelion 3.0+1.01             Quote Post by Xenoblade » Sun Jun 06, 2021 8:22 pm Gendo'sPapa wrote: They REALLY wanna get the film to 10 billion yen don't they? I wonder if this might just be the trick to get them there.

[]: Re: Evangelion 3.0+1.01             Quote Post by mastafishere » Sun Jun 06, 2021 8:44 pm I know I'm reaching, but I feel like this all but confirms we'll be getting a longer cut when it comes out on Blu-ray. A 3.0 +1.11 or 3.33 + 1.11.

[]: Re: Evangelion 3.0+1.01             Quote Post by hui43210 » Sun Jun 06, 2021 8:45 pm Konja7 wrote: hui43210#924049 wrote: That's so cool! I've been hoping for a manga about the timpskip since 3.0 came out!

[]: Re: Evangelion 3.0+1.01             Quote Post by JoelcrNeto » Sun Jun 06, 2021 8:47 pm Konja7 wrote: This manga seems to be 120 minutes before 3.0, so I guess it will be about the preparations to take Eva-01.

[]: Re: Evangelion 3.0+1.01             Quote Post by GhostlyOcam » Sun Jun 06, 2021 8:56 pm LOL I thought they're releasing yet ANOTHER version of 3.0 but 30 minutes longer, before noticing the "-" But still, very cool knowing they're actually expanding the Rebuild canon which used to be exclusively only on film, as minor as the adddition was. As for 3.0+1.01, I wonder which cuts they fixed. The most criticisms I read are the CGI heavy scenes in the 3rd act (you know which one, it's on the trailer).

[]: Re: Evangelion 3.0+1.01             Quote Post by Konja7 » Sun Jun 06, 2021 9:46 pm JoelcrNeto wrote: And I should point out that in the promo illustration that I posted in my previous post, Asuka is wearing a different plugsuit, not the same one we saw damaged, especially if you look at her wrist. Did they change this in version Q:3.333? Did I miss something?

[]: Re: Evangelion 3.0+1.01             Quote Post by Archer » Mon Jun 07, 2021 12:15 am More news is always welcome, though it's definitely pretty funny that they're already doing a .01 version. On one hand, with all the extra time they had you would've figured that they would've had the opportunity to add in everything they wanted. On the other hand, I totally know the feeling of handing something in only to realize there's some more small details you could've polished up after the fact. Not sure how I feel about info about the timeskip being released in NOT the movie. Hopefully it's just non-essential lore stuff that isn't actually relevant to the plot. I also hope that this isn't yet another attempt to crawl to $10B before they'll announce an international release...

[]: Re: Evangelion 3.0+1.01             Quote Post by GhostlyOcam » Mon Jun 07, 2021 12:51 am If we go by previous films, the "1.01" makes it clear that it's not the "definitive" version, but I wonder what makes them bother to do so if they're planning to release the eventual 3.33+1.11 later other than injecting the last remaining hype it has to boost the theatrical gross to 10 billion yen. But kudos to them for being honest that it's merely an "updated" version instead of extended one, unlike what Avengers: Endgame did to cross Avatar 's BO (adding unfinished deleted scenes as post-credit scenes after hyping them up as additional footage).

[]: Re: Evangelion 3.0+1.01             Quote Post by JoelcrNeto » Mon Jun 07, 2021 6:32 am Konja7 wrote: Using the translation machine, it seems to say this image of Asuka isn't included in the booklet. It seems to be only a promotional image. Of course, I don't know if this is correctly translated.

[]: Re: Evangelion 3.0+1.01             Quote Post by FullMetalBiscuit » Mon Jun 07, 2021 7:22 am Cool news about the manga. Final run sounds like, well, the final run so hopefully focus will shift to home release and international.

[]: Re: Evangelion 3.0+1.01             Quote Post by A Renegade Deserter » Mon Jun 07, 2021 8:01 am So it's about a short manga meant as a prequel to 3.0 with the -120 Min in the Title.

[]: Re: Evangelion 3.0+1.01             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon Jun 07, 2021 8:34 am So this time they're doing this while it's still in the theatres instead of doing 3 separate DVD releases The manga/extra stuff could be anything between a full reveal to just a deleted scene filled with mostly space nerdery. I hope it shall reach the interwebs fast.
